title: UK overseas trade in goods statistics December 2023: import and export data
body: "The following tables contain EU and non-EU import and export data for December 2023 at chapter level.               UK overseas trade in goods statistics December 2023: imports    MS Excel Spreadsheet, 34.1 KB                    UK overseas trade in goods statistics December 2023: exports    MS Excel Spreadsheet, 35.6 KB       "
